# Sdance AI

Sdance AI is an independent AI creation website for Seedance video workflows, image generation/editing, public examples, prompts, pricing, and developer documentation.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://sdanceai.com)
- [Features](https://sdanceai.com/#features)
- [Showcase](https://sdanceai.com/showcase)
- [Prompts](https://sdanceai.com/prompts)
- [Blog](https://sdanceai.com/blog)
- [Pricing](https://sdanceai.com/pricing)
- [API Docs](https://sdanceai.com/apidoc)
- [Seedance 2](https://sdanceai.com/seedance2)
- [Seedance 1.5](https://sdanceai.com/seedance-15)
- [About / Contact](https://sdanceai.com/about#contact-us)

## Localized Versions

- [English](https://sdanceai.com) - default locale
- [中文](https://sdanceai.com/zh)
- [日本語](https://sdanceai.com/ja)

## Resources

- [GitHub prompt repository](https://github.com/sdanceai/awesome_seedance2_prompt)
- [Support email](mailto:support@sdanceai.com)
